member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.CalendarController.Get(System.DateTime,System.DateTime,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns calendar events and (optionally) time entries for the authenticated user within the given date range.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.CalendarController.Post(CleanArchitecture.Core.Features.Calendar.Commands.CreateCalendarEvent.CreateCalendarEventCommand)
member.summary: Creates a new calendar event. Only Managers and Admins can create events.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.CalendarController.Put(System.Int32,CleanArchitecture.Core.Features.Calendar.Commands.UpdateCalendarEvent.UpdateCalendarEventCommand)
member.summary: Updates an existing calendar event. Only the creator or project manager can update.
